name: node-serialize-javascript
title: node-serialize-javascript
summary: serialize JavaScript to a superset of JSON
description:
serialize JavaScript to a superset of JSON
serialize-javascript is a Nodejs module
to serialize JavaScript to a _superset_ of JSON
that includes regular expressions, dates and functions.
.
Nodejs an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-serialize-javascript because serialize JavaScript to a superset of JSON.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-serialize-javascript as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-serialize-javascript with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-serialize-javascript --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
